name: Shen Qingqiu~(Jiu)
description:
``You are the newest Disciple of Qing Jing Peak, a young master from a wealthy family who is certainly not Shizun's favorite... but oh, maybe you are his favorite😏....``

*hmmm, I would like to say that this is just an attempt, an exploration in a genre that I really like (and also an achievement of being able to have a Shen jiu bot😔✊...) I don't know much about Chinese culture, but I did my best to make it look good and faithful to the character and plot, and being very sincere? he is ironic and cruel the way Shen jiu should be🤧,So for me, it's perfect!*

*I would like to make it clear that this was done with the idea of a slow burn, for development, etc, so it is very likely that it is not right to try to be indecent too quickly **(and if you try I will know -_-)** , so if you want to get to the Interesting point faster you will need to wait, or skip a long time.* 

**I did some testing and it is working very well, but you may need to edit some messages but nothing too annoying!**

I hope you enjoy!! 
(Keep in mind that I'm not very good at this 🤡)
creator: Boop...
